policies.support: 24/7 support is available only on the Pro plan.

faq.what_is_autostream: AutoStream is a SaaS product that provides automated video editing tools for content creators.
faq.how_does_ai_editing_work: Upload your raw footage and AutoStream AI helps automate cuts, transitions, and captions.
faq.supported_formats: AutoStream supports common creator video formats and exports optimized outputs for social platforms.
